creator: dick@tar.com
text:
The function _thread_kern_sched (in /usr/src/lib/libc_r/uthread/uthread_kern.c) sets the
variable _thread_kern_in_sched to prevent the function from being interrupted by a SIGVTALRM.
However, the variable does not always get reset upon exit from the function.  It is therefore,
possible, for subsequent SIGVTALRM's to be ignored indefinately.  This will prevent sleeping
threads from being awakened, and prevent long running threads from being preempted.
